package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for model_package_depends_on_transport_or_gin: `model` or `models` packages that import transport-facing libraries or handler DTO packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule098NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule098NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule098NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario098Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule098NegativeService, input Rule098NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
